title: Understand: humans and ecosystems
description: Check your understanding of humans and ecosystems in this set of free practice questions aligned to NGSS standards.

choices.content: the resources that people extract from ecosystems
the processes that keep ecosystems healthy
the ways that ecosystems benefit people’s lives and traditions

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these best describes a *provisioning* ecosystem service?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: a useful resource that comes from an ecosystem
a process that helps keep an ecosystem healthy
an effect of an ecosystem on a person’s traditions

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

>Provisioning ecosystem services are \_\_\_\_\_\_.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: the resources that people extract from ecosystems
the processes that keep ecosystems healthy
the ways that ecosystems benefit people’s lives and traditions

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these is an example of a *supporting* ecosystem service?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: the drinking water that can be obtained from an ecosystem
the fun experiences that an ecosystem can provide

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these is an example of a *supporting* ecosystem service?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: the foods that can be harvested from an ecosystem
the sense of well-being that an ecosystem can provide

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these is an example of a *supporting* ecosystem service?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: photosynthesis, which is carried out by plants in an ecosystem
the sources of energy that people can get from an ecosystem
the adventures that a person can have in an ecosystem

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which ecosystem services are defined as the processes that keep ecosystems healthy?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

>\_\_\_\_\_\_  are the processes that keep ecosystems healthy.

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

>\_\_\_\_\_\_ are the ways that ecosystems benefit people’s lives and traditions.

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

>A decrease in biodiversity will make it \_\_\_\_\_\_ for people to get the ecosystem services they need.

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Choose the best word to fill in the blank.**

>A loss of biodiversity will make it \_\_\_\_\_\_ for people to get the ecosystem services they need.

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Determine if the statement below is true or false.**

>A loss of biodiversity will make it easier for people to get the ecosystem services they need.

[[☃ radio 1]]
